root.name: Add text box with 'Intel Skylake Die Layout' caption below processor image on slide 14
root.description: Evaluates whether a text box with the specified caption was correctly added to slide 14 in the appropriate position relative to the processor image

children.name: Text box added to slide 14
children.description: Verifies that a new text box was added to slide 14 by comparing element counts and identifying text elements

scorer.function_code:
def compute_score() -> tuple[str, float]:
    from pptx import Presentation
    from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE_TYPE
    
    try:
        original_prs = Presentation(original_ppt_path)
        modified_prs = Presentation(modified_ppt_path)
        
        if len(original_prs.slides) < 14 or len(modified_prs.slides) < 14:
            return "Slide 14 not available in one or both presentations", 0.0
            
        original_slide = original_prs.slides[13]  # 0-indexed
        modified_slide = modified_prs.slides[13]
        
        # Count text boxes in original and modified slides
        original_text_boxes = [shape for shape in original_slide.shapes 
                              if hasattr(shape, 'text_frame') and shape.shape_type == MSO_SHAPE_TYPE.TEXT_BOX]
        modified_text_boxes = [shape for shape in modified_slide.shapes 
                              if hasattr(shape, 'text_frame') and shape.shape_type == MSO_SHAPE_TYPE.TEXT_BOX]
        
        if len(modified_text_boxes) > len(original_text_boxes):
            return f"Text box added to slide 14 (original: {len(original_text_boxes)}, modified: {len(modified_text_boxes)})", 1.0
        else:
            return f"No new text box detected on slide 14 (original: {len(original_text_boxes)}, modified: {len(modified_text_boxes)})", 0.0
            
    except Exception as e:
        return f"Error checking for text box addition: {str(e)}", 0.0

children.name: No animation or transition changes
children.description: Verifies that no animations or transitions were added, removed, or modified

scorer.function_code:
def compute_score() -> tuple[str, float]:
    total_changes = (len(ppt_diff.added_animations) + 
                    len(ppt_diff.removed_animations) + 
                    len(ppt_diff.modified_animations) +
                    len(ppt_diff.added_transitions) + 
                    len(ppt_diff.removed_transitions) + 
                    len(ppt_diff.modified_transitions))
    
    if total_changes == 0:
        return "No animation or transition changes detected", 1.0
    else:
        return f"Unintended animation/transition changes detected: {total_changes} total changes", 0.0
